prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（A）高热推荐；统计学（A+）推荐；人工智能（谨慎观望）；电子信息/通信（高热推荐）；电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，按近年物理类占比约66.6%估算，2026年物理类考生约145654人，较2025年121443人增长约19.9%， 竞争加剧；中国人民大学位于北京，非本省高校；该校在甘肃招生占比约1.2%–1.7%，属跨省招生，无本地偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次376 名、2026年扩招122.2%（位次数字大幅增大效应）与甘肃物理类考生增长约19.9%（竞争加剧效应），扩招幅度远超考生增幅，整体录取难度下降；但人大物理类招生专业（计算 机、统计学、人工智能等）均为高热推荐专业，品牌吸引力强，部分抵消扩招效应；预计2026年最低位次约602名，区间530–674名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 371 → 528 → 426 → 370 → 376, with a baseline of about 376 in 2025; the fluctuation range from 2021 to 2024 was 370–528, rebounding to 376 in 2025, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu was 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 9 in 2025 (gradually shrinking); the 2026 plan is 20, an increase of approximately 122.2% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably lowers the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, a top-tier comprehensive institution; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of approximately 966,000; there was a clear negative reputation in 2024, turning neutral/mixed in 2025; overall reputation fluctuations have a slight suppressing effect on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines, among those related to Physics Category enrollment: Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A-; the Science Experimental Class covers popular directions such as Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (A) highly recommended; Statistics (A+) recommended; Artificial Intelligence (cautiously wait and see); Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended); Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended); the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is 218,700, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 66.6% in recent years, so the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 145,654, an increase of about 19.9% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in this province; its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%–1.7%, belonging to cross-province enrollment, with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 376, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 122.2% (effect of significantly increasing ranking numbers) and the growth of Physics Category candidates in Gansu by about 19.9% (effect of intensifying competition), the expansion far exceeds the candidate growth, overall lowering admission difficulty; however, the Physics Category enrollment majors at Renmin University (Computer Science, Statistics, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) are all highly recommended popular majors, with strong brand appeal, partially offsetting the expansion effect; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 602, with a range of 530–674.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 65 → 61 → 75 → 64 → 74, with a fluctuation range of 61–75 in the past 5 years, and a baseline of about 74 in 2025; overall rankings are stable within a narrow range of 60–75, with no obvious unilateral trend.\ nThe university's enrollment plan in Gansu for History Category was 16 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, an increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically lowers the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (17th in 2025, 18th in 2024), firmly in the national Top 20, a top institution in humanities and social sciences; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (professor sexual harassment leading to dismissal, etc.); Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 966,000; in 2024, there were obvious negative reputations (5 teacher ethics incidents), turning neutral/mixed in 2025; overall reputation fluctuations have a slight suppression on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 9 A+ disciplines: Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Business Administration, Statistics, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature; 6 A-level disciplines (Chinese History, Philosophy, Foreign Languages and Literature, Political Science, Computer Science and Technology, etc.); a total of 15 disciplines at A- and above, with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (A+) is socially hot and recommended; Finance/Economics/Applied Economics (A+) is differentiated and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication (A+) is clearly discouraged; Statistics (A+) is recommended; Computer Science (A) is highly recommended; the total number of regular college entrance examination students in Gansu in 2026 is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (History Category 58,374 + Physics Category 121,443 = 179,817); based on the recent proportion of History Category of about 33.4%, the estimated number of History Category examinees in 2026 is about 73,046, an increase of about 25.1% compared to 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Gansu; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%–1.7% (2021–2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the mutual offset of the 2025 baseline ranking of 74, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 45.5% (ranking number increase effect), and the Gansu History Category examinee growth of about 25.1% (competition intensification effect), along with multiple factors such as slightly negative reputation, top disciplinary strength, and differentiated major popularity, the expected minimum ranking for 2026 is about 84, with a range of 74–94.
